title: The A4 Blind Spot — 100 Million Buyers Search It. You Don't List It.
caption:
UK, EU, and Australia all use A4 (297×210mm) — not US inch sizes.

Most Etsy sellers only list 2:3 ratios. That means every international buyer searching for A4 leaves empty-handed.

SnapToSize includes A4, A3, A5 and A2 automatically in every upload — no extra steps, no manual resizing.

Link in bio -> app.snaptosize.com
